title: Berberis jinshajiangensis
taxonomy: Berberis jinshajiangensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Berberidaceae. It is native to China, specifically in the Jinsha River valley in the Sichuan and Yunnan provinces. The classification of Berberis jinshajiangensis is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, and the order Ranunculales. This species belongs to the genus Berberis, which contains approximately 600 species of shrubs and small trees. Berberis jinshajiangensis is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and degradation.
